channel.title: Surveys on Scepter914 Website
channel.description: Recent content in Surveys on Scepter914 Website

item.title: Simple-BEV: What Really Matters for Multi-Sensor BEV Perception? (arxiv 2022/09)
item.description: Simple-BEV: What Really Matters for Multi-Sensor BEV Perception? (arxiv 2022/09) Summary https://simple-bev.github.io/ https://github.com/aharley/simple_bev NuScenes, Lyft гҒ§train code NuScenesгҒҜpretrain modelгҒӮгӮҠ Camera-Radar fusion гҒ® BEV detection жӨңеҮә input: Camera * 6 (360еәҰ) + radar pointcloud Depth-based, Homography-based гҒ§гҒҜ

item.title: BEVerse: Unified Perception and Prediction in Birds-Eye-View for Vision-Centric Autonomous Driving (arxiv2022/05)
item.description: BEVerse: Unified Perception and Prediction in Birds-Eye-View for Vision-Centric Autonomous Driving (arxiv2022/05) Summary https://arxiv.org/pdf/2205.09743.pdf https://github.com/zhangyp15/BEVerse Multi-Camera BEV perception 3d detection, motion prediction, semantic map гҒ®multi-task learning semantic map гҒҜ mapгҒ®гҒҝгҒ§objectгҒҜеҗ«гҒҫгҒӘгҒ„ motion prediction гҒҜsegmentatio

item.title: Center-based 3D Object Detection and Tracking (araxiv 2020/06, CVPR2021)
item.description: summary LiDAR-based 3d object detection + tracking Anchor-free 2020е№ҙгҒӮгҒҹгӮҠгҒӢгӮүгҒ®гғҮгғ•гӮЎгӮҜгғҲгӮ№гӮҝгғігғҖгғјгғү https://github.com/tianweiy/CenterPoint github CenterгҒ®зӮ№гӮ’иҖғгҒҲгӮӢжүӢжі• anchor-freeгҒ§иҖғгҒҲгӮүгӮҢгҒҰгҖҒtracki

item.title: LetвҖҷs Get Dirty: GAN Based Data Augmentation for Camera Lens Soiling Detection in Autonomous Driving (WACV2021)
LU-Net: An Efficient Network for 3D LiDAR Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation Based on End-to-End-Learned 3D Features and U-Net (ICCV Workshop 2019)
item.description: жҰӮиҰҒ https://arxiv.org/abs/1908.11656 https://github.com/pbias/lunet github Lidar 3D Semantic Segmentation 3D -> 2D -> Unet range imageгҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢSegmantationгҒ®гӮҸгҒӢгӮҠгӮ„гҒҷгҒ„жҰӮиҰҒеӣігҒҢгҒӮгӮӢ range image baseгӮ’еүІеҗҲзҙ°гҒӢгҒҸиӘ¬жҳҺгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢеҚ°иұЎ

item.title: Multi-View 3D Object Detection Network for Autonomous Driving (IROS2019)
item.description: жҰӮиҰҒ Rangenet++гҒ®жҸҗжЎҲ https://www.ipb.uni-bonn.de/wp-content/papercite-data/pdf/milioto2019iros.pdf Paper https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wuokg7MFZyU youtube http://jbehley.github.io/ и‘—иҖ… https://github.com/PRBonn/lidar-bonnetal github Lidar-only semantic segmentation. LidarгҒ®real-time procesing, 10fpsзЁӢеәҰ projection-based methods a spherical projectionгӮ’дҪҝгҒЈгҒҹ2D

item.title: Multimodal Trajectory Predictions for Autonomous Driving using Deep Convolutional Networks (ICRA2019)
item.description: Summary Raster mapгӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҹ1 agent multi-modal prediction https://github.com/nutonomy/nuscenes-devkit/blob/master/python-sdk/nuscenes/prediction/models/mtp.py github code зўәзҺҮгҒЁгҒЁгӮӮгҒ«иӨҮж•°зөҢи·Ҝ(= multi-modal) гӮ’еҮәеҠӣгҒ§гҒҚгӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ«жӢЎејө single modalгҒ гҒЁиЎҢгҒҚгӮӮгҒ—гҒӘгҒ„гҒЁгҒ“гӮҚгҒ®pathгҒҢеҮәгҒҰгҒҸгӮӢ Method i: a

item.title: One Million Scenes for Autonomous Driving: ONCE Dataset (2021/06 arxiv)

item.title: Optimising the selection of samples for robust lidar camera calibration (arxiv 2021/03)

item.description: summary UberгҒ«гӮҲгӮӢPrediction framework REINFORCE гҒ®жҸҗжЎҲ MapгӮ„дәӨйҖҡгғ«гғјгғ«гҒӢгӮүеҘҪгҒҫгҒ—гҒ„дәҲжё¬гҒ®outputгӮ’еҮәгҒ—гҒҹгҒ„гҒҢгҖҒеҹәжң¬зҡ„гҒ«еҫ®еҲҶдёҚеҸҜиғҪ REINFORCE gradient estim

item.title: Uncertainty-aware Short-term Motion Prediction of Traffic Actors for Autonomous Driving (arxiv2018, WACV2020)
item.description: Summary from Uber 1 agentгҒ”гҒЁгҒ®йқҷзҡ„ең°еӣі+д»–гҒ®и»ҠдёЎгҒӘгҒ©еӢ•зҡ„зҠ¶жіҒгӮ’гғ©гӮ№гӮҝгғ©гӮӨгӮәеҢ–гҒ—гҒҹз”»еғҸгӮ’inputгҒЁгҒ—гҒҹ1 agent, single-modal prediction Background Method Input Rasterized input RGBгҒ®3chгҒ®гғҮгғјгӮҝ йҒ“и·Ҝ
